final:
module phase_shifter (  
    input [4:0] phase_in,  
    input [2:0] shift_amount,  
    output reg [4:0] phase_out  
);  
    always @(phase_in, shift_amount) begin  
        phase_out = (phase_in >> shift_amount) | (phase_in << (5 - shift_amount));  
    end  
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      phase_out <= phase_in & ~shift_amount;
    end
  end

endmodule
